schema.description: End-to-end hotel search and reservation server: find destinations, browse hotels, retrieve details, book rooms, and cancel reservations.

tools.name: search_destinations
tools.description: Search for travel destinations by city name and retrieve location details.

city.description: The city name to search for (e.g., "Paris", "New York").

destination_id.description: The unique identifier of the destination.

country.description: The country where the city is located.

location.description: Additional location information for the destination.

tools.name: get_hotels
tools.description: Retrieve available hotels at a destination for specific check-in and check-out dates.

destination_id.description: The unique identifier of the destination returned by search_destinations.

checkin_date.description: Check-in date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be a valid future date.

checkout_date.description: Check-out date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be after checkin_date.

adults.description: Number of adults staying, defaults to 2.

kids.description: Number of kids staying, defaults to 0.

limit.description: Maximum number of hotels to return, defaults to 20.

hotels.description: List of available hotels matching the criteria.

hotel_id.description: The unique identifier of the hotel.

star_rating.description: The star rating of the hotel (1-5).

checkin_date.description: The check-in date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

checkout_date.description: The check-out date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

price_per_night.description: The price per night for the room in the hotel's local currency.

total_price.description: The total price for the entire stay in the hotel's local currency.

tools.name: book_hotel
tools.description: Create a hotel room reservation for specified guests and dates.

hotel_id.description: The unique identifier of the hotel returned by get_hotels.

checkin_date.description: Check-in date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Must match the dates used in get_hotels.

checkout_date.description: Check-out date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Must match the dates used in get_hotels.

room_type_id.description: The unique identifier of the room type selected from get_hotel_details room_types list.

kids.description: Number of kids staying, defaults to 0.

guest_info.description: List of guest information required for identity verification. Each guest must have name, phone, and id_number.

name.description: Full name of the guest as it appears on the ID.

phone.description: Contact phone number of the guest.

id_number.description: Government-issued ID number for identity verification.

booking_confirmation.description: Details of the confirmed hotel booking.

booking_id.description: The unique identifier of the booking.

hotel_name.description: The name of the booked hotel.

checkin_date.description: The check-in date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

checkout_date.description: The check-out date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

total_price.description: The total price paid for the booking in the hotel's local currency.

booking_status.description: The current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending).

tools.name: get_hotel_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive information about a specific hotel including room types and amenities.

hotel_id.description: The unique identifier of the hotel returned by get_hotels.

address.description: The full street address of the hotel.

description.description: A descriptive overview of the hotel and its amenities.

room_types.description: List of available room types offered by the hotel.

room_type_id.description: The unique identifier of the room type.

room_name.description: The name of the room type (e.g., Deluxe Double, Suite).

price.description: The price per night for this room type in the hotel's local currency.

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel an existing hotel booking subject to the hotel's cancellation policy and deadlines.

booking_id.description: The unique identifier of the booking returned by book_hotel.

scenarios.description: Basic scenario with minimal data - one destination, one hotel, and one booking

H001.description: Luxury hotel in the heart of Manhattan

scenarios.description: Multiple destinations and hotels with varied attributes, some optional fields empty

H001.description: 5-star luxury hotel with Eiffel Tower views

H002.description: Convenient business hotel near Tokyo Station

scenarios.description: Comprehensive scenario with multiple destinations, hotels, detailed information, and various bookings

H001.description: Iconic 5-star luxury hotel in the heart of London

H002.address: Jumeirah St - Umm Suqeim 3 - Dubai - UAE
H002.description: Luxury hotel known for its distinctive sail-shaped silhouette

H003.description: Integrated resort famous for its infinity pool

scenarios.description: Test edge cases including empty collections, minimum star rating, zero price, and invalid date format

errors.error_details:
7 validation errors for HotelBookingScenario
hotels.H001.star_rating
  Input should be greater than or equal to 1 [type=greater_than_equal, input_value=0, input_type=int]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/greater_than_equal
hotels.H001.price_per_night
  Input should be greater than or equal to 0 [type=greater_than_equal, input_value=-50.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/greater_than_equal
hotels.H001.total_price
  Input should be greater than or equal to 0 [type=greater_than_equal, input_value=-250.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/greater_than_equal
hotel_details_map.H001.room_types.0.price
  Input should be greater than or equal to 0 [type=greater_than_equal, input_value=-100.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/greater_than_equal
bookings.B1000.checkin_date
  String should match pattern '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$' [type=string_pattern_mismatch, input_value='invalid-date', input_type=str]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_pattern_mismatch
bookings.B1000.checkout_date
  String should match pattern '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$' [type=string_pattern_mismatch, input_value='also-invalid', input_type=str]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_pattern_mismatch
bookings.B1000.total_price
  Input should be greater than or equal to 0 [type=greater_than_equal, input_value=-300.0, input_type=float]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/greater_than_equal
errors.expected_vs_actual:
Expected: validation_error (scenario should be rejected due to invalid data)
Actual: validation_error occurred (scenario was correctly rejected)
errors.root_cause: Scenario contains multiple invalid values: star_rating=0 (should be ≥1), negative prices, invalid date formats, and negative booking_counter
